Ice Thermodynamics
==================

API reference for the ``pygotm.icethm`` package.  The package provides five
ice/snow thermodynamics models dispatched through a unified Numba kernel.
See :doc:`/physics/ice_thermodynamics` for the full scientific description
of each model.

Driver
------

.. automodule:: pygotm.icethm.driver
   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:

   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:
